rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks to the current component implementation
Ensure the annex block is properly closed with a semicolon
Place the annex block at the end of the component implementation
Do not add any new clauses or modify existing architecture
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Ensure all annex blocks are properly closed with a semicolon
Place annex blocks at the end of the component implementation
Use only visible identifiers in the annex block
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementation annexes are used for implementation-level bindings
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
anti_patterns: Do not add new clauses or modify existing architecture
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use invalid helper declarations or unresolved identifiers
